zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡整理，潜在上行空间有限
zh.content:
当前比特币价格围绕$81725.75附近震荡，短线跌幅有限，仅-0.11%，显示市场短期多空力量相对均衡。日内高低点$81813.03/$81575表明上方阻力约在$81800附近，下方支撑初步落在$81550至$81575区间。

技术指标显示，SMA(20)位于$81289.09，价格略高于均线，短期仍维持上行趋势，但缺少RSI和MACD信号确认，市场动力不明。MACD值219.35提示多头仍在，但信号线未提供完整交叉信息，需谨慎观察动能变化。

支撑阻力分析显示，若价格跌破$81550，将加大短期下行风险；若突破$81800阻力，则可能尝试向$82000甚至$82300测试。结合均线位置与当前波动，可认为价格处于震荡区间，投资者应关注关键技术位突破。

交易策略上，短线建议观望或轻仓逢低布局，控制仓位，关注突破确认信号。若价格稳健上破$81800，可考虑短线追多；反之，若下破$81550，止损离场为宜，以防短期回调加剧。风险管理和耐心等待明确信号为当前操作重点。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently consolidating near the $81,700 level, showing a relatively tight trading range over the last 24 hours. Price action remains slightly above the 20-period simple moving average at $81,289, suggesting a mild bullish bias in the short term. Despite the minimal 24-hour loss of 0.11%, the market is exhibiting signs of indecision, as reflected in the narrow high-low range of $81,575 to $81,813. This suggests that traders are cautiously evaluating the next directional move.  

The MACD reading of 219.35, with no signal line provided, still points toward underlying bullish momentum, though the absence of the signal line limits confirmation of a cross. The inability to calculate RSI also removes a key measure of overbought or oversold conditions. However, the current proximity to the SMA(20) can act as a dynamic support level, making the $81,200–$81,300 zone critical for maintaining short-term bullish structure. A breach below this could open a retest of the $81,000 psychological support.  

Resistance is visible at the intraday high of $81,813, which also coincides with recent swing highs. A decisive break above this level would likely attract momentum traders, targeting $82,000 and higher psychological levels. Conversely, if sellers regain control, a drop toward $81,200–$81,000 would be expected, with further support at $80,500–$80,600 forming a deeper floor. Monitoring volume around these levels will be crucial to gauge the strength of any breakout or breakdown.  

For trading strategy, cautious traders might consider waiting for a confirmed breakout above $81,813 for a long entry, with a stop just below $81,200. Short-term scalpers could exploit the tight range, buying near SMA support and selling near intraday resistance. Risk management remains key, as volatility spikes can lead to rapid swings in either direction. Overall, Bitcoin is poised for a directional move but currently favors minor bullish continuation unless support levels fail.
